OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enable or disable auto-import of external references.

CONNECTOR_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.description: The confidence level for the connector (0-100).

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_IMPORT_AS_PDF.description: Import external reference content as a PDF file.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_IMPORT_AS_MD.description: Import external reference content as a Markdown file.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_IMPORT_PDF_AS_.description: If import as Markdown is enabled, try to convert PDF content to Markdown.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_TIMESTAMP_FILE.description: Timestamp imported files to prevent overwriting previous versions.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_CACHE_SIZE.description: Size of the LRU URL cache to prevent fetching the same object repeatedly.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_CACHE_TTL.description: Time-to-live in seconds for cache entries.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_BROWSER_WORKER.description: Number of browser worker threads to use for rendering.

IMPORT_EXTERNAL_REFERENCE_MAX_DOWNLOAD_S.description: Maximum download size in bytes (default: 50 MB).
